${p(t?.title||"Keep your eyes closed")}

${p(t?.text||`${n} is awake. Leave your phone face-down and listen for the Storyteller.`)}

\u2014 \u25E1 \u2014
`}function va(e,t){let n=t.extras.length===2&&t.extras.every(o=>o==="werewolf");R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
First night only

Reveal the two spare cards. You may exchange your Thief card for either fate.${n?" Both are Werewolves, so one must be taken.":""}

${t.extras.map((o,s)=>`
`).join("")}
${h.thiefRevealed?"":'
Tap either card to reveal both
'} ${h.thiefRevealed?ke(`
${n?"":''}
`):""}
`}function ba(e,t){let n=Object.values(e.players).filter(s=>!s.storyteller).map(s=>s.id),o=h.cupidChoices;R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
\u2665

Choose exactly two characters. You may bind yourself. Their roles remain secret even from one another.

${et(e,n,{action:"choose-cupid",selected:o})} ${ke(``)}
`}function wa(e,t){let n=e.players[t.partnerId];R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
\u2665
Bound beneath the moon

${p(n?.name||"A hidden lover")}

You live and die together. You may never vote against one another. Their character role remains unknown to you.

${ke('')}
`}function ka(e,t){if(!t.target){let s=Object.values(e.players).filter(r=>r.alive&&!r.storyteller&&r.id!==e.me.id).map(r=>r.id);R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
One vision each night

Choose one living soul. Their complete character card will be shown only to you.

${et(e,s,{action:"seer-choose"})}
`;return}let n=e.players[t.target],o=C[t.result]||C.villager;R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e,{title:n.name,subtitle:h.seerFlipped?`The vision reveals ${o.name}.`:"Tap their card to reveal the truth."})}
${Ns(t.result,h.seerFlipped,{label:!0,tapAction:"flip-seer"})}
${h.seerFlipped?"":'
Turn over the chosen card
'} ${h.seerFlipped?ke(''):""}
`}function Ta(e,t){let n=[e.me.id,...t.teammates],o=Object.values(e.players).filter(a=>a.alive&&!a.storyteller&&!n.includes(a.id)).map(a=>a.id),s=t.votes[e.me.id],r=n.map(a=>{let i=t.votes[a];return`${e.players[a]?.name||"Wolf"} \u2192 ${i?e.players[i]?.name:"choosing\u2026"}`});R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
Your pack
${n.map(a=>`\u{1F43A} ${p(e.players[a]?.name||"Werewolf")}`).join("")}

Agree on the same victim. If the pack cannot agree, nobody dies tonight.

${et(e,o,{action:"wolf-vote",selected:s?[s]:[],note:(a,i)=>Object.values(t.votes).filter(l=>l===i).length?`${Object.values(t.votes).filter(l=>l===i).length} pack choice`:"Possible victim"})}
Silent consensus
${r.map(a=>`
${p(a)}
`).join("")}${t.consensus?'
\u2713 The pack agrees
':""}
${t.littleGirlInPlay?``:""}
`}function $a(e){R.innerHTML=Zn(e,{title:"Dare you peek?",text:"The Werewolves are awake. You may quietly lift your eyes from the table to spy on them\u2014but if the pack catches you, you die instead of their chosen victim."})}function xa(e,t){let n=t.victim?e.players[t.victim]:null,o=Object.values(e.players).filter(r=>r.alive&&!r.storyteller).map(r=>r.id),s=h.poisonOpen||!!h.witchPoisonTarget;R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
The pack chose${n?p(n.name):"No victim tonight"}
${t.potions.poison&&s?`
Poison target
${et(e,o,{action:"choose-poison",selected:h.witchPoisonTarget?[h.witchPoisonTarget]:[]})}
`:""}
You may use either potion, both potions, or neither. Each used potion disappears for the rest of this game.
${ke('')}
`}function Sa(e,t){let n=t.candidates.filter(a=>e.players[a]?.alive&&!e.players[a].storyteller),o=t.election?[]:e.me.loverId?[e.me.loverId]:[],s=t.election?"Choose the Sheriff":"Cast your judgement",r=t.election?"The winner\u2019s village votes count twice. You may nominate yourself.":"Your choice stays sealed until the Storyteller closes the vote.";R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e,{title:s,subtitle:r})} ${et(e,n,{action:"cast-vote",selected:t.choice?[t.choice]:[],disabled:o,note:(a,i)=>o.includes(i)?"Your lover \xB7 forbidden":i===e.me.id?"Vote for yourself":a.sheriff?"Current Sheriff":"Tap to choose"})} ${t.choice?`
\u2713 Vote sealed for ${p(e.players[t.choice].name)}

Tap another name to change it before the ballot closes.

`:'
Choose one name
'}
`}function Aa(e,t){let n=t.type==="hunter",o=t.candidates.filter(s=>s!==e.me.id&&e.players[s]?.alive);R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e,{title:n?"One final shot":"Name your successor",subtitle:n?"Death cannot silence the Hunter\u2019s last act.":"Pass the Sheriff\u2019s badge before you leave the village."})}

${n?"Choose one living character to die with you.":"Choose one living character to inherit the double vote."}

${et(e,o,{action:"resolve-pending"})} ${n?'':""}
`}function Ca(e){let t=e.privateAction||{};return t.done&&t.type!=="vote"?(R.innerHTML=Zn(e,{title:"Your choice is sealed",text:"Return the phone face-down. The Storyteller will continue when the village is ready."}),!0):t.type==="thief"?va(e,t):t.type==="cupid"?ba(e,t):t.type==="lover"?wa(e,t):t.type==="seer"?ka(e,t):t.type==="werewolf"?Ta(e,t):t.type==="little-girl"?$a(e):t.type==="witch"?xa(e,t):t.type==="vote"?Sa(e,t):t.type==="hunter"||t.type==="sheriff-successor"?Aa(e,t):!1}function nn(e){return e.lastDeaths?.length?`
${e.lastDeaths.map(t=>{let n=C[t.role]||C.villager;return`

${p(t.name)}

Claimed by ${p(t.cause)}.

${p(n.name)} was revealed.

`}).join("")}
`:'
\u2600

Nobody died

The village wakes intact\u2014but suspicion survived the night.

'}function qs(e){let t=e.lastVote?.tally||{},n=Math.max(1,...Object.values(t)),o=Object.entries(t).sort((s,r)=>r[1]-s[1]);return o.length?`
${o.map(([s,r])=>`
${p(e.players[s]?.name||"Unknown")}${r}
`).join("")}
`:'

No votes were cast.

'}function Ea(e){let t=e.storyteller;if(!t)return"";let o={"setup-thief":["story-advance","Call Cupid","Waiting for the Thief"],"setup-cupid":["story-advance","Wake the lovers","Waiting for Cupid"],"setup-lovers":["story-advance","Call the Seer","Waiting for the lovers"],"night-seer":["story-advance","Let the Seer sleep","Waiting for the Seer"],"night-wolves":["story-advance","Let the pack sleep","Waiting for one victim"],"night-witch":["story-advance","Seal the night\u2019s fate","Waiting for the Witch"],dawn:["story-dawn",e.settings.sheriff&&!e.sheriffId&&e.day===1?"Hold the Sheriff election":"Open the village debate",""],"sheriff-vote":["story-close-election","Seal the Sheriff ballot","Waiting for votes"],"day-discussion":["story-start-vote","Open the village vote",""],"day-vote":["story-close-vote","Seal the village vote","Waiting for votes"],"day-result":["story-next-night","Night falls once more",""]}[e.phase];if(!o)return"";let r=["setup-thief","setup-cupid","setup-lovers","night-seer","night-wolves","night-witch"].includes(e.phase)&&!t.canAdvance,a=["sheriff-vote","day-vote"].includes(e.phase)&&t.voteProgress.cast===0,i=``,l=e.phase==="night-wolves"&&!t.canAdvance?'':"";return ke(`
${l}${i}
`)}function Pa(e){let t=e.storyteller,n=(t.waitingFor||[]).map(i=>e.players[i]?.name).filter(Boolean),o=Object.values(e.players).filter(i=>i.alive&&!i.storyteller).length,s="";if(e.phase==="night-wolves"){let i=t.wolfVictim?e.players[t.wolfVictim]?.name:null;s=`
Pack decision${t.wolfConsensus?p(i||"Agreed"):"Not agreed"}
Little Girl${t.littleGirlCaught?"Caught":"Safe so far"}
`}if(e.phase==="night-witch"){let i=t.littleGirlCaught?Object.keys(t.roles).find(l=>t.roles[l]==="little-girl"&&e.players[l]?.alive):t.wolfVictim;s=`
Pack victim${p(e.players[i]?.name||"None")}
Witch choice${t.witchDraft.heal?"Heal ":""}${t.witchDraft.poisonTarget?"+ poison":t.witchDraft.heal?"":"Waiting"}
`}e.phase==="night-seer"&&t.seerTarget&&(s=`
The Seer viewed ${p(e.players[t.seerTarget]?.name||"a player")}
`),["sheriff-vote","day-vote"].includes(e.phase)&&(s=`
Ballot progress

${t.voteProgress.cast} of ${t.voteProgress.total} living characters have voted. Choices stay hidden until sealed.

`);let r="";if(e.phase==="dawn"&&(r=nn(e)),e.phase==="day-result"&&(r=`${qs(e)}${nn(e)}`),e.phase==="day-discussion"&&(r='

Put the phone down

Guide the accusation around the table. Open the ballot only when the village has truly argued its case.

'),e.phase==="resolution"){let i=t.pending,l=i?e.players[i.actorId]:null,g=l?.connected;if(r=`
A final act is waiting

${i?.type==="hunter"?`${p(l?.name)} must take a final shot`:i?.type==="sheriff-successor"?`${p(l?.name)} must name a new Sheriff`:"Fate is resolving"}

${g?"The choice is open on their phone.":"That phone is disconnected. You may resolve the choice on their behalf."}

`,i&&!g){let u=Object.values(e.players).filter(c=>c.alive&&!c.storyteller).map(c=>c.id);r+=et(e,u,{action:"story-proxy-final"}),i.type==="hunter"&&(r+='')}}let a=!["dawn","day-result","day-discussion","resolution"].includes(e.phase);R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
${p(t.cue||"Hold the silence. Let the village feel the turn of the moon.")}
${n.length?`
Waiting for ${p(n.join(", "))}
`:""} ${s}${r} ${a?`
Open the Storyteller\u2019s secret ledger
${Object.entries(t.roles).map(([i,l])=>`
${p(e.players[i]?.name)}
${p(C[l]?.name||l)}
`).join("")}
`:""}
Living${o}
Time${e.phase.startsWith("night")||e.phase.startsWith("setup")?`Night ${e.night}`:`Day ${e.day}`}
${Ea(e)}
`}function Ra(e){let t=C[e.me.role]||C.villager;R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}
You are a silent spirit

${p(t.name)}

Watch the tale, but do not speak, signal or vote. Your team can still win.

`}function La(e){R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}${nn(e)}

Listen as the Storyteller opens the village square.

`}function Oa(e){R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}

Look up from your phone

Accuse. Defend. Bluff. Watch every face around the table. The Storyteller will open the ballot when debate ends.

${js(e)}
`}function Ma(e){let t=e.lastVote?.leaders?.length>1;R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e,{title:t?"The vote is tied":"The village has spoken",subtitle:t?"By the classic rule, nobody is eliminated.":"The sealed tally is now revealed."})}
${qs(e)}
${nn(e)}

Night will fall when the Storyteller is ready.

`}function Da(e){let t=e.winner||{team:"none",title:"The Tale Is Ended",text:""},n=t.team==="wolves"?"\u{1F43A}":t.team==="village"?"\u2600":t.team==="lovers"?"\u2665":"\u263E";R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}
${n}
Final revelation

${p(t.title)}

${p(t.text)}

${Object.values(e.players).map(o=>{let s=o.storyteller?"storyteller":o.role,r=C[s]||C.villager;return`
${p(o.name)}${p(r.name)}${o.sheriff?" \xB7 Sheriff":""}
`}).join("")}

No score is kept. A new game reshuffles every role and chooses a new random Storyteller.

${e.coordinator?ke(''):""}
`}function ja(){let e=H;if(sn(e),e.phase==="lobby")return ga(e);if(e.phase==="role-reveal")return ya(e);if(e.phase==="game-over")return Da(e);if(Ca(e)===!1){if(e.me.storyteller)return Pa(e);if(!e.me.alive)return Ra(e);if(e.phase==="dawn")return La(e);if(e.phase==="day-discussion")return Oa(e);if(e.phase==="day-result")return Ma(e);if(e.phase==="resolution"){R.innerHTML=`
${B(e)}${Y(e)}

A final choice is being made

Keep silent while fate resolves around the table.

`;return}R.innerHTML=Zn(e)}}function Oe(){if(!h.modal){wt.innerHTML="";return}if(h.modal==="rules"){wt.innerHTML=`

The Moonfall deck

The app follows the original base-game role powers and turn order, adapted for private phone actions.

${["werewolf","villager","seer","witch","hunter","cupid","little-girl","thief","sheriff","storyteller"].map(e=>`

${p(C[e].name)}

${p(C[e].rule)}

`).join("")}

Read the publisher\u2019s classic rulebook

`;return}if(h.modal==="install"){let e=zr(),t=As()&&!Bn()?'':"";wt.innerHTML=`

Make Moonfall an app

${e?"In Safari, tap the Share button, choose \u201CAdd to Home Screen\u201D, then open Moonfall from its new icon.":"Open your browser menu and choose \u201CInstall app\u201D or \u201CAdd to Home screen\u201D, then launch Moonfall from its icon."}

${t}

Installed mode removes most browser controls. Moonfall also keeps every joined phone awake and restores the peer connection when the app returns to the foreground.

`;return}if(h.modal==="menu"){let e=Yn()?"":'',t=As()?``:"";wt.innerHTML=`

Moonfall

${L==="connected"?"Village link healthy":L==="connecting"?"Reconnecting to the village":"The host is currently away"}${Re?"Screen-awake protection is active.":"Tap anywhere if your browser has paused screen-awake protection."}
${e}${t}${Le?'':""}${H?.coordinator&&H.phase!=="lobby"&&H.phase!=="game-over"?'':""}

Every joined phone is kept awake. If the OS still suspends the web app, Moonfall restores the peer link and saved seat when the screen returns.

The Storyteller\u2019s phone plays the room cues. Night actions on player phones stay silent, and there is no background music.

`}}function Vs(){x?x==="guest"&&!H?ma():ja():pa(),Oe()}async function In(e){try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(e),X("Copied to the clipboard.","success")}catch{let t=document.createElement("textarea");t.value=e,document.body.appendChild(t),t.select(),document.execCommand("copy"),t.remove(),X("Copied to the clipboard.","success")}}function Na(){return`${location.origin}${location.pathname}?room=${P}`}async function qa(e,t){let n=t.dataset.id;if(e==="home-tab")$("tap"),h.homeTab=t.dataset.tab,D();else if(e==="create-room")$("tap"),ia(document.querySelector("#create-name")?.value||"");else if(e==="start-agent-test")$("tap"),la(document.querySelector("#create-name")?.value||document.querySelector("#join-name")?.value||"");else if(e==="join-room")$("tap"),ca(document.querySelector("#join-name")?.value||"",document.querySelector("#join-code")?.value||"");else if(e==="resume-room")$("tap"),ua(t.dataset.code);else if(e==="copy-code")$("tap"),In(P||H?.roomCode||"");else if(e==="copy-diagnostics")$("tap"),In(Yr());else if(e==="share-room"){$("tap");let o={title:"Join my Moonfall village",text:`Join Moonfall with code ${P}`,url:Na()};if(navigator.share)try{await navigator.share(o)}catch{}else In(`${o.text} ${o.url}`)}else if(e==="remove-player")confirm(`Remove ${H.players[n]?.name||"this player"} from the lobby?`)&&M("host:remove",{seatId:n});else if(e==="set-preset")$("tap"),M("host:preset",{preset:t.dataset.preset});else if(e==="toggle-role"){$("tap");let o=t.dataset.role,s=[...H.settings.roles],r=s.includes(o)?s.filter(a=>a!==o):[...s,o];M("host:settings",{roles:r})}else if(e==="start-game")M("host:start");else if(e==="flip-role")h.roleFaceUp=!h.roleFaceUp,$("flip"),xt(18),D();else if(e==="seal-role")h.roleFaceUp=!1,$("decision"),M("player:seen-role");else if(e==="reveal-thief")h.thiefRevealed=!0,D();else if(e==="choose-thief")M("player:thief-choice",{choice:t.dataset.choice});else if(e==="choose-cupid"){if(h.cupidChoices.includes(n))h.cupidChoices=h.cupidChoices.filter(o=>o!==n);else if(h.cupidChoices.length<2)h.cupidChoices.push(n);else{X("Cupid can bind exactly two hearts.","error");return}xt(16),D()}else e==="submit-cupid"?M("player:cupid-choose",{choices:h.cupidChoices}):e==="lovers-seen"?M("player:lovers-seen"):e==="seer-choose"?M("player:seer-choose",{target:n}):e==="flip-seer"?(h.seerFlipped=!h.seerFlipped,D()):e==="seer-done"?(h.seerFlipped=!1,M("player:seer-done")):e==="wolf-vote"?M("player:wolf-vote",{target:n}):e==="little-girl-caught"?confirm("Confirm that the Little Girl was physically caught peeking? She will replace the pack\u2019s chosen victim.")&&M("player:little-girl-caught"):e==="toggle-heal"?(h.witchHeal=!h.witchHeal,xt(16),D()):e==="open-poison"?(h.poisonOpen=!0,D()):e==="choose-poison"?(h.witchPoisonTarget=n,h.poisonOpen=!0,xt(16),D()):e==="clear-poison"?(h.witchPoisonTarget=null,h.poisonOpen=!1,D()):e==="submit-witch"?M("player:witch-submit",{heal:h.witchHeal,poisonTarget:h.witchPoisonTarget}):e==="cast-vote"?($("decision"),M("player:cast-vote",{target:n})):e==="resolve-pending"?($(H?.privateAction?.type==="hunter"?"hunter":"sheriff"),M("player:resolve-pending",{target:n||null})):e==="story-advance"?M("story:advance"):e==="story-no-kill"?confirm("Continue with no Werewolf victim tonight?")&&M("story:no-kill"):e==="story-dawn"?M("story:dawn"):e==="story-start-vote"?M("story:start-vote"):e==="story-close-election"?M("story:close-election"):e==="story-close-vote"?confirm("Seal the vote now? Any living player who has not voted will abstain.")&&M("story:close-vote"):e==="story-next-night"?M("story:next-night"):e==="story-proxy-final"?M("story:proxy-final",{target:n||null}):e==="reset-game"?confirm("Return every card to the deck and abandon the current tale?")&&(h.modal=null,M("host:reset")):e==="open-menu"?($("tap"),h.modal="menu",Oe()):e==="install-app"?($("tap"),await ta()):e==="toggle-fullscreen"?($("tap"),await ea()):e==="show-rules"?($("tap"),h.modal="rules",Oe()):e==="toggle-sound"?(Le?($("tap"),Le=!1):(Le=!0,Un(),$("decision")),He(Rs,Le),Oe()):e==="preview-howl"?$("howl"):e==="close-modal"?($("tap"),h.modal=null,Oe()):e==="leave-game"&&(h.modal=null,da())}function Is(e){let t=e.target.closest("[data-action]");!t||t.disabled||(e.preventDefault(),Un(),qa(t.dataset.action,t))}R.addEventListener("click",Is);wt.addEventListener("click",Is);R.addEventListener("input",e=>{e.target.id==="join-code"&&(e.target.value=Kn(e.target.value))});R.addEventListener("change",e=>{e.target.id==="wolf-setting"&&M("host:settings",{wolves:e.target.value==="auto"?"auto":Number(e.target.value)}),e.target.id==="sheriff-setting"&&M("host:settings",{sheriff:e.target.value==="true"})});R.addEventListener("keydown",e=>{e.key==="Enter"&&(e.target.id==="create-name"&&document.querySelector('[data-action="create-room"]')?.click(),["join-name","join-code"].includes(e.target.id)&&document.querySelector('[data-action="join-room"]')?.click())});window.addEventListener("beforeunload",Os);na();Vs();})();
